query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `news` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `excerpt` text,
  `category` enum('companie','proiecte','hr','it','evenimente','realizari') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'companie',
  `tags` text,
  `authorId` int NOT NULL,
  `isPinned` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isPublished` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `imageUrl` text,
  `viewCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `news_comments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `newsId` int NOT NULL,
  `authorId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `news_reactions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `newsId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('like','heart','clap','fire') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'like',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pontaj` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `checkIn` datetime,
  `checkOut` datetime,
  `breakMinutes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalMinutes` int,
  `type` enum('birou','remote','deplasare','concediu','medical','liber_legal','absent','recuperare') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'birou',
  `notes` text,
  `approvedBy` int,
  `status` enum('draft','submitted','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `correctionReason` text,
  `isLocked` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50),
  `description` text,
  `clientName` varchar(255),
  `status` enum('activ','finalizat','suspendat','oferta') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'activ',
  `type` enum('structura','arhitectura','instalatii','mixt') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mixt',
  `googleDriveFolderId` varchar(255),
  `googleDriveFolderUrl` text,
  `managerId` int,
  `budgetHours` int,
  `isBillable` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `time_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `startTime` datetime,
  `endTime` datetime,
  `durationMinutes` int,
  `activityType` enum('proiectare','consultanta','sedinta','documentare','deplasare','administrativ','verificare','executie') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'proiectare',
  `taskName` varchar(255),
  `description` text,
  `isBillable` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `isRunning` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('draft','salvat','aprobat') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `approvedBy` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `processes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50),
  `department` enum('management','proiectare','executie','financiar','hr','it','comercial','general') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `description` text,
  `content` text,
  `version` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0',
  `ownerId` int,
  `status` enum('draft','activ','arhivat') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'activ',
  `isMandatoryRead` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `attachments` text,
  `tags` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `process_read_confirmations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `processId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `confirmedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `version` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0'
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `referenceNumber` varchar(50),
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `benefits` text,
  `category` enum('proces','tehnic','hr','it','financiar','altele') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'altele',
  `authorId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','submitted','in_review','approved','rejected','implemented') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `managerApproval` enum('pending','approved','rejected'),
  `committeeApproval` enum('pending','approved','rejected'),
  `managerNotes` text,
  `committeeNotes` text,
  `voteCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposal_votes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `proposalId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('up','down') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'up',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposal_comments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `proposalId` int NOT NULL,
  `authorId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notifications` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('pontaj','document','propunere','stire','proces','sistem') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sistem',
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `isRead` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `link` varchar(500),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
